---
name: Task
about: A development task linked to an epic
title: "[TASK] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Epic/Milestone**
Link to the milestone this task belongs to.

**Objective**
What does this task accomplish?

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] No clippy warnings (`cargo clippy -- -D warnings`)

**Technical Details**
Files to modify, approach, or design notes.

**Dependencies**
Any tasks that must be completed before this one.
